requirement_topic.en: EMC and radio compliance for power banks

summary.en: Portable power banks with electronics or wireless features are reviewed for EMC and radio expectations in Senegal, especially for ARTP-relevant goods.
summary.zh: 带电子或无线功能的移动电源在塞内加尔需要进行EMC及无线相关审查，尤其涉及ARTP的产品。
summary.zht: 帶電子或無線功能的行動電源在塞內加爾需要進行EMC及無線相關審查，尤其涉及ARTP的產品。

standards_or_laws: ASN technical expectations for electronic products

summary.en: China uses GB/T EMC and MIIT/SRRC controls domestically. These are helpful references but do not automatically satisfy Senegal import inspection pathways.
summary.zh: 中国有GB/T EMC与MIIT/SRRC国内控制措施，可做参考，但不能直接满足塞内加尔进口检验流程。
summary.zht: 中國有GB/T EMC與MIIT/SRRC國內控制措施，可作參考，但不能直接滿足塞內加爾進口檢驗流程。

gap.en: There is no one-to-one EU-style horizontal substance regime in this lane. The gap is mainly importer-ready documentation, French language readiness, and ARTP-facing review alignment.
gap.zh: 该场景没有可一一对应的欧盟式横向物质制度，差距主要在于进口商可用文档、法语化和ARTP适配。
gap.zht: 該場景沒有可一一對應的歐盟式橫向物質制度，差距主要在於進口商可用文件、法語化和ARTP適配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for imports with relevant radio or electronic compliance review requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically where Chinese rules apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CN approvals are useful but not sufficient; build importer-led French packages and verify ARTP relevance in Senegal before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CN核准有参考价值但不足以单独合规，需在出口前形成进口商主导的法文文件并确认ARTP适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CN核准有參考價值但不足以單獨合規，需在出口前形成進口商主導的法文文件並確認ARTP適配。
